# Relative Links

A small fixture for exercising relative Markdown link navigation.

A plain click opens the target in the current tab; Cmd/Ctrl+Click and
middle-click open it in a new browser tab.

## Same directory

- [Next page](next.md)
- [Next page, Section A](next.md#section-a)

## Subdirectory

- [Getting started](docs/getting-started.md)
- [Configuration (.mdx)](docs/configuration.mdx)

## Unaffected link types

- [Anchor on this page](#same-directory)
- [External link](https://example.com)
